socials.title: WHERE TO FIND ME
socials.sub: Are you bored? How about watch some of my useless contents.

merch.title: NO MERCH YET
merch.body: T-shirts, stickers, wall art, home decor, and more designed and sold by independent artists. Find Calamytryx-inspired gifts and merchandise printed on quality products (none so far).

fanart.title: CALAMYTY'S FAN ARTS
fanart.body: You want to draw, sketch, sculpt, or even NSFW R34 — you could all be here, just use the #CalArts or #Calats or nsfw.

about.title: HUH?
about.body: Calamyty Mytryx is a Vtuber who streams on TikTok and Twitch and posts on Twitter. He is also known as Calamytryx or Calamyty. He is a level 20 disaster who plays random games and interacts with his fans. He has a third character model that he plans to reveal soon. He is part of the PHVtuber community, which is a Group of Filipino Vtubers.

cdc.title: Chaos
cdc.body: Vtuber streamer with nothing but chaos on his contents and bringing bad omen to others.

cdc.title: Disaster
cdc.body: Disaster on organizing, undoubtfully unscheduled V-Streamer. May such wonderful lady help him.

cdc.title: Cataclysm
cdc.body: Anger issues would be nothing but a content everyone sees. His end is always near once he got cancelled on twitter.

quote.text: For he who does not seek chaos, does not know what peace truly meant for
quote.author: Calamytryx

support.title: SUPPORT?
support.body: You could always support me in Ko-Fi, Gank, and many other platforms — just always remember support is not a reason for me to be your slave.
